{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = First Director
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[First Director]] was a famous [[Archmage of transmutation]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
